resources.string:
Compatibility updates for Android 15 & 16
 Changed the logic of styles
 Changed colors of context action modes
 Added ‘App font’ option
 Replaced ‘event types’ concept with ‘calendars’
 Renamed built-in ‘Regular event’ calendar to ‘Local calendar’
 Updated holiday data
 Fixed bugs, improved stability

Support for setting event visibility
 Option to hide date header in event list widget
 Updated translations
 Updated holiday data
 Other minor bug fixes and improvements
Added option to select the text label color for the widget\n Fixed date and time selection dialogs\n Improved performance, bug fixes
